revision.text:
{{Infobox hieroglyphs|TITEL=Book of the Day|name=wn:N35:N35-W24:X1-N3:N5-Z1-Z2:N35-h-r:Z7*N5|NAME-TRANSKRIPTION=wenut-net-heru
''wnwt-nt-hrw''
''Book of the Day''|qq=}}{{complex|qq=}} The {{ill|Book of the Night|de|Buch der Nacht|en|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Book of the Night|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of the Night|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} has an uncertain existence. But it is linked. It is the corresponding double of the {{ill|Book of the Day|de|Buch des Tages|en|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Book of the Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of the Day|qid=Q997784|1=Book of the Day}} and used to study the {{ill|Ancient Egyptian Day|lt=Ancient Egyptian Day|fr|Journée_égyptienne_antique|de|Tag_(Altes_Ägypten)|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Day|en:draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Day|qid=Q1669420|1=Ancient Egyptian Day}} == Speculative table == {| class="wikitable" style="width: 98%; border: 2px solid gray;" | colspan="2" align="center" style="background:#FFE39B" |'''Hours of the night and the corresponding hour deities''' |- bgcolor="#FFE39B" !Hour !Name |- bgcolor="#f5f5f5" |{{ill|First hour of the night (Ancient Egypt)|lt=1st Hour|de|Erste Nachtstunde (Altes Ägypten)|simple|User:Immanuelle/First hour of the night (Ancient Egypt)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First hour of the night (Ancient Egypt)|qid=Q1361948|1=First hour of the night (Ancient Egypt)}} | |- bgcolor="#fffaf0" |2nd Hour | |- bgcolor="#f5f5f5" |3rd Hour | |- bgcolor="#fffaf0" |4th Hour | |- bgcolor="#f5f5f5" |5th Hour | |- bgcolor="#fffaf0" |6th Hour | |- bgcolor="#f5f5f5" |7th Hour | |- bgcolor="#fffaf0" |8th Hour | |- bgcolor="#f5f5f5" |9th Hour | |- bgcolor="#fffaf0" |10th Hour | |- bgcolor="#f5f5f5" |11th Hour | |- bgcolor="#fffaf0" |{{ill|Twelfth hour of the night (Ancient Egypt)|lt=12th Hour|de|Zwölfte Nachtstunde (Altes Ägypten)|simple|User:Immanuelle/Twelfth hour of the night (Ancient Egypt)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelfth hour of the night (Ancient Egypt)|qid=Q245250|1=Twelfth hour of the night (Ancient Egypt)}} | |} [[de:Buch der Nacht]] [[fr:User:Immanuelle/Book of the Night]] [[en:Book of the Night]] {{wikidata link|Q136721327}}
